requirement_topic.en: SEC Mandatory Stamp and Product Registration — Chile Market Entry
requirement_topic.zh: SEC强制认证章和产品注册——智利市场准入
requirement_topic.zht: SEC強制認證章和產品注冊——智利市場准入

summary.en: SEC (Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles) requires mandatory product registration and the SEC stamp for listed electrical products before they may be sold or installed in Chile. Industrial AC motors are within SEC's listed product scope. Manufacturers must register with SEC and obtain the SEC stamp; the registration requires technical documentation including specifications, test reports, and IE efficiency class declaration. Foreign manufacturers must work through a Chilean-based representative or importer who holds SEC registration. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) is not recognised by SEC and does not substitute for SEC registration.
summary.zh: SEC（电力和燃料监察局）要求列入目录的电气产品在智利销售或安装前须强制注册并获SEC认证章。工业交流电机属于SEC列管产品范围。制造商须向SEC注册并获得SEC认证章；注册须提供技术文件，包括规格书、测试报告和IE效率等级声明。境外制造商须通过持有SEC注册的智利本地代理商或进口商操作。CCC（中国强制认证）不被SEC认可，不能替代SEC注册。
summary.zht: SEC（電力和燃料監察局）要求列入目錄的電氣產品在智利銷售或安裝前須強制注冊並獲SEC認證章。工業交流電機屬於SEC列管產品範圍。製造商須向SEC注冊並獲得SEC認證章；注冊須提供技術文件，包括規格書、測試報告和IE效率等級聲明。境外製造商須通過持有SEC注冊的智利本地代理商或進口商操作。CCC（中國強制認證）不被SEC認可，不能替代SEC注冊。

standards_or_laws: Ley 18.410 (SEC organic law and electrical product oversight)
Reglamento de Instalaciones Eléctricas de Corrientes Fuertes (RISECC)
SEC Resolución Exenta — product registration requirements

summary.en: China's CCC (China Compulsory Certification) is the pre-market mandatory certification for electrical products within the CCC catalogue scope (including some motor categories). For general industrial three-phase AC motors, CCC scope may apply for sub-1 kV motors in certain categories; manufacturers should verify the current CNCA CCC catalogue. CCC is administered by CNCA and testing is conducted by designated CAB (Certification and Accreditation Bodies). CCC is a domestic Chinese requirement and is not recognised by Chilean SEC.
summary.zh: 中国CCC（强制认证）是CCC目录范围内电气产品（包括部分电机类别）的上市前强制认证。对于通用工业三相交流电机，CCC范围可能适用于某些类别的1 kV以下电机；制造商应核查最新CNCA CCC目录。CCC由CNCA管理，检测由指定认证机构（CAB）进行。CCC是中国国内要求，不被智利SEC认可。
summary.zht: 中國CCC（強制認證）是CCC目錄範圍內電氣產品（包括部分電機類別）的上市前強制認證。對於通用工業三相交流電機，CCC範圍可能適用於某些類別的1 kV以下電機；製造商應核查最新CNCA CCC目錄。CCC由CNCA管理，檢測由指定認證機構（CAB）進行。CCC是中國國內要求，不被智利SEC認可。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — CNCA catalogue, domestic market only

gap.en: CCC certification held by Chinese manufacturers has no recognition in Chile. SEC mandatory stamp and product registration are required for Chilean market entry — this is a structural market-access gap. Foreign manufacturers must designate a Chilean-based responsible entity (importer or representative) to hold and manage SEC registration. Technical documentation must be prepared in accordance with SEC requirements, referencing NCh standards (IEC adoptions). This is analogous to requiring a new conformity package — CCC documentation cannot be directly reused for SEC registration.
gap.zh: 中国制造商持有的CCC认证在智利不被认可。进入智利市场须获得SEC强制认证章和产品注册——这是结构性市场准入差距。境外制造商须在智利指定持有并管理SEC注册的本地责任实体（进口商或代理商）。技术文件须按照SEC要求准备，引用NCh标准（IEC采纳版本）。这类似于需要全新合规文件包——CCC文件不能直接用于SEC注册。
gap.zht: 中國製造商持有的CCC認證在智利不被認可。進入智利市場須獲得SEC強制認證章和產品注冊——這是結構性市場准入差距。境外製造商須在智利指定持有並管理SEC注冊的本地責任實體（進口商或代理商）。技術文件須按照SEC要求準備，引用NCh標準（IEC採納版本）。這類似於需要全新合規文件包——CCC文件不能直接用於SEC注冊。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — SEC stamp and product registration required before Chilean market entry for listed electrical equipment; no SEC stamp = product cannot be legally sold or installed
mandatory_status.cn: CCC mandatory for motors in CCC catalogue scope (domestic China market only); not applicable for Chilean market access

source.publisher: SEC — Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles, Chile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motor manufacturers exporting to Chile must obtain SEC mandatory stamp and product registration before market entry. CCC is not recognised by SEC and cannot substitute for this requirement. A Chilean-based responsible entity (importer or representative) must hold SEC registration. Technical documentation must reference NCh standards. This is the primary and non-negotiable market-access gate for industrial motors in Chile. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 向智利出口的中国电机制造商在进入市场前须获得SEC强制认证章和产品注册。CCC不被SEC认可，不能替代此要求。须由智利本地责任实体（进口商或代理商）持有SEC注册。技术文件须引用NCh标准。这是智利工业电机市场准入的首要且不可商议的门槛。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 向智利出口的中國電機製造商在進入市場前須獲得SEC強制認證章和產品注冊。CCC不被SEC認可，不能替代此要求。須由智利本地責任實體（進口商或代理商）持有SEC注冊。技術文件須引用NCh標準。這是智利工業電機市場准入的首要且不可商議的門檻。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: Import Customs and Tariff — China-to-Chile Motor Imports
requirement_topic.zh: 进口关税——中国至智利电机进口
requirement_topic.zht: 進口關稅——中國至智利電機進口

summary.en: Chile applies a general MFN tariff of 6% on most goods under its open trade policy. Chile has a Free Trade Agreement (FTA) with China (ChAFTA, signed 2005, in force 2006, with additional Upgrade Protocol signed 2023). Under ChAFTA and its upgrade, industrial motors may qualify for preferential or zero tariff rates depending on HS code classification and rules of origin. The applicable HS codes for industrial three-phase AC motors are generally in HS 8501 (electric motors). Importers should verify current ChAFTA schedules and rules-of-origin requirements. SEC stamp is a pre-import requirement and must be obtained before customs clearance for listed electrical products.
summary.zh: 智利对大多数商品实行6%的一般最惠国关税，贸易政策较为开放。智利与中国签有自贸协定（ChAFTA，2005年签署，2006年生效，2023年签署升级议定书）。根据ChAFTA及其升级协议，工业电机可能依据HS编码归类和原产地规则享受优惠或零关税待遇。工业三相交流电机通常归入HS 8501（电动机）。进口商须核查当前ChAFTA税率表及原产地规则要求。SEC认证章是进口前置要求，列管电气产品须在清关前获得。
summary.zht: 智利對大多數商品實行6%的一般最惠國關稅，貿易政策較為開放。智利與中國簽有自貿協定（ChAFTA，2005年簽署，2006年生效，2023年簽署升級議定書）。根據ChAFTA及其升級協議，工業電機可能依據HS編碼歸類和原產地規則享受優惠或零關稅待遇。工業三相交流電機通常歸入HS 8501（電動機）。進口商須核查當前ChAFTA稅率表及原產地規則要求。SEC認證章是進口前置要求，列管電氣產品須在清關前獲得。

standards_or_laws: ChAFTA — China-Chile Free Trade Agreement (in force 2006, Upgrade Protocol 2023)
HS 8501 — Electric motors and generators (tariff classification)
SEC mandatory registration (prerequisite for customs clearance of listed electrical products)

summary.en: China applies standard export procedures for motors. No special export licence is required for standard industrial AC motors. Exporters must provide a commercial invoice, packing list, certificate of origin (for ChAFTA preferential tariff), and technical documentation. A Form F certificate of origin (Chile-China FTA) is required to claim preferential tariff rates under ChAFTA. CCC documentation is not required for export from China but may be requested for reference by Chilean importers.
summary.zh: 中国对电机采用标准出口程序。标准工业交流电机无需特殊出口许可证。出口商须提供商业发票、装箱单、产地证书（用于ChAFTA优惠关税）和技术文件。索取ChAFTA优惠关税须提供F表格产地证书（智利-中国FTA）。CCC文件不是从中国出口的必要条件，但智利进口商可能参考要求。
summary.zht: 中國對電機採用標準出口程序。標準工業交流電機無需特殊出口許可證。出口商須提供商業發票、裝箱單、產地證書（用於ChAFTA優惠關稅）和技術文件。索取ChAFTA優惠關稅須提供F表格產地證書（智利-中國FTA）。CCC文件不是從中國出口的必要條件，但智利進口商可能參考要求。

standards_or_laws: ChAFTA Form F certificate of origin (for preferential tariff claim)

gap.en: The China-Chile FTA (ChAFTA) is a significant advantage, potentially enabling zero or reduced tariffs on industrial motors. The key gap is procedural: SEC stamp must be obtained before customs clearance; a Form F certificate of origin is needed to claim FTA preferential rates. Chinese exporters unfamiliar with ChAFTA rules-of-origin requirements may miss preferential tariff entitlements. SEC registration processing time should be factored into market-entry planning.
gap.zh: 中智自贸协定（ChAFTA）是重大优势，可能使工业电机享受零关税或减让关税。主要差距属程序性：SEC认证章须在清关前获得；索取FTA优惠税率须提供F表格产地证书。不熟悉ChAFTA原产地规则要求的中国出口商可能错失优惠关税待遇。SEC注册处理时间应纳入市场进入规划。
gap.zht: 中智自貿協定（ChAFTA）是重大優勢，可能使工業電機享受零關稅或減讓關稅。主要差距屬程序性：SEC認證章須在清關前獲得；索取FTA優惠稅率須提供F表格產地證書。不熟悉ChAFTA原產地規則要求的中國出口商可能錯失優惠關稅待遇。SEC注冊處理時間應納入市場進入規劃。

mandatory_status.target: SEC stamp mandatory before customs clearance; Form F certificate of origin required for ChAFTA preferential tariff (voluntary but financially significant)
mandatory_status.cn: Standard export documentation; Form F certificate of origin issued by CCPIT or customs for ChAFTA preferential tariff

source.publisher: Servicio Nacional de Aduanas — Chile Customs

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China-Chile FTA (ChAFTA) may enable preferential or zero tariffs for industrial motors — exporters should verify current HS 8501 tariff schedule and secure Form F certificates. SEC stamp is a hard prerequisite for customs clearance and must be in place before shipment for listed electrical products. Plan SEC registration lead time accordingly. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中智自贸协定（ChAFTA）可能使工业电机享受优惠或零关税——出口商应核查现行HS 8501税率表并获取F表格产地证书。SEC认证章是清关的硬性前提条件，列管电气产品须在发货前取得。据此规划SEC注册所需时间。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中智自貿協定（ChAFTA）可能使工業電機享受優惠或零關稅——出口商應核查現行HS 8501稅率表並獲取F表格產地證書。SEC認證章是清關的硬性前提條件，列管電氣產品須在發貨前取得。據此規劃SEC注冊所需時間。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。

requirement_topic.en: Manufacturer Registration and Chilean Responsible Entity
requirement_topic.zh: 制造商注册与智利责任实体
requirement_topic.zht: 製造商注冊與智利責任實體

summary.en: SEC requires that electrical products sold in Chile be registered under a responsible entity established in Chile. Foreign manufacturers must work through a Chilean importer, distributor, or authorised representative who holds or applies for SEC registration on behalf of the product line. The Chilean responsible entity is accountable to SEC for product compliance, safety, and market surveillance cooperation. Manufacturer registration with SEC requires: company details, product technical specifications, test reports referencing NCh/IEC standards, IE efficiency class declaration, and sample inspection may be required. Registration must be renewed and maintained for ongoing market presence.
summary.zh: SEC要求在智利销售的电气产品须在智利设立的责任实体名下注册。境外制造商须通过持有或申请SEC注册的智利进口商、经销商或授权代理商操作。智利责任实体须对SEC承担产品合规、安全和市场监管配合的责任。向SEC注册制造商须提供：公司信息、产品技术规格、引用NCh/IEC标准的测试报告、IE效率等级声明，可能还须提供样品检验。注册须续期并保持有效以维持持续市场存在。
summary.zht: SEC要求在智利銷售的電氣產品須在智利設立的責任實體名下注冊。境外製造商須通過持有或申請SEC注冊的智利進口商、經銷商或授權代理商操作。智利責任實體須對SEC承擔產品合規、安全和市場監管配合的責任。向SEC注冊製造商須提供：公司信息、產品技術規格、引用NCh/IEC標準的測試報告、IE效率等級聲明，可能還須提供樣品檢驗。注冊須續期並保持有效以維持持續市場存在。

standards_or_laws: Ley 18.410 (SEC organic law, product safety and registration framework)
SEC Resolución Exenta — manufacturer and product registration procedures
NCh/IEC 60034-1 (technical basis for motor specification in registration)

summary.en: China has no outbound equivalent of a mandatory manufacturer registration requirement for export electrical products. Chinese exporters typically rely on their overseas trading partner (distributor or importer) to fulfil market-entry obligations in the destination country. CCC certificate holders are designated within China for domestic market purposes; this role does not extend to Chilean market accountability. No China-Chile bilateral agreement creates regulatory equivalence for manufacturer registration.
summary.zh: 中国对出口电气产品没有对应的强制制造商注册要求。中国出口商通常依赖境外贸易伙伴（经销商或进口商）履行目的地国的市场准入义务。CCC证书持有人在中国境内为国内市场目的而指定，该角色不延伸至智利市场的法律责任。中智双边协议不涉及制造商注册的监管等效。
summary.zht: 中國對出口電氣產品沒有對應的強制製造商注冊要求。中國出口商通常依賴境外貿易夥伴（經銷商或進口商）履行目的地國的市場准入義務。CCC證書持有人在中國境內為國內市場目的而指定，該角色不延伸至智利市場的法律責任。中智雙邊協議不涉及製造商注冊的監管等效。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — domestic market only, no Chile equivalent role
No direct CN equivalent to SEC Chilean manufacturer registration

gap.en: Chinese motor manufacturers selling to Chile must designate a Chilean-based entity to hold SEC registration before any products are sold or installed. This is a structural market-access requirement with no Chinese domestic equivalent. Many first-time exporters underestimate the lead time for SEC registration and the need for a committed local representative. Without an active SEC registration held by a Chilean entity, motors cannot legally enter the Chilean electrical installation market regardless of their technical quality.
gap.zh: 向智利销售的中国电机制造商须在任何产品销售或安装前，指定智利本地实体持有SEC注册。这是一项结构性市场准入要求，在中国国内没有对应要求。许多首次出口商低估了SEC注册的前置时间，以及对专注本地代理商的需求。如无智利实体持有有效SEC注册，无论产品技术质量如何，电机均不得合法进入智利电气安装市场。
gap.zht: 向智利銷售的中國電機製造商須在任何產品銷售或安裝前，指定智利本地實體持有SEC注冊。這是一項結構性市場准入要求，在中國國內沒有對應要求。許多首次出口商低估了SEC注冊的前置時間，以及對專注本地代理商的需求。如無智利實體持有有效SEC注冊，無論產品技術質量如何，電機均不得合法進入智利電氣安裝市場。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Chilean responsible entity with SEC registration required; no SEC registration = no legal market entry for listed electrical products
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable for export; CCC holder is China-based for domestic market only

source.publisher: SEC — Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles, Chile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese motor exporters must identify and contract a Chilean responsible entity to hold SEC registration before first shipment. This is often the most overlooked and longest-lead-time compliance step for first-time Chile exporters. Without active SEC registration, market entry is not lawful regardless of motor technical quality. Engage qualified local counsel or an experienced Chilean electrical product importer early in the market-entry process. This is informational only and does not constitute legal advice.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国电机出口商须在首次发货前确定并签约智利责任实体持有SEC注册。这通常是首次进入智利市场出口商最容易忽视、且前置时间最长的合规步骤。没有有效SEC注册，无论电机技术质量如何，均不得合法进入市场。建议在市场进入流程早期聘请合格当地律师或有经验的智利电气产品进口商。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律建议。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國電機出口商須在首次發貨前確定並簽約智利責任實體持有SEC注冊。這通常是首次進入智利市場出口商最容易忽視、且前置時間最長的合規步驟。沒有有效SEC注冊，無論電機技術質量如何，均不得合法進入市場。建議在市場進入流程早期聘請合格當地律師或有經驗的智利電氣產品進口商。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律建議。
